claim_bullets.bullet_text: Dark magic uses power of wicked gods, such as Phalaris, with unknown aspects of power source (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.142-148).
In narrow sense, only Phalaris priests are dark priests, unknown if other wicked gods' followers exist (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.142-148).
Dark magic shares origin with holy magic, but uses power of evil gods, unknown if effects vary (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.142-148).

source_record_text: Chapter 11.2 Dark Magic (part 1) from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, covering dark magic, dark priests, and basic dark magic spells, with unknown aspects of the power source and effects.
